specific_mechanism: L-COT: alphabet + production rules + parallel rewriting + depth-d cap + self-similarity constraint on CoT
llm_application: Use a formal-grammar production-rule set to constrain LLM chain-of-thought; at each step, expand ALL active reasoning symbols in parallel; cap recursion at fixed depth; enforce self-similarity so child-step structure mirrors parent-step structure.
novelty_claim: Recursive Decomposition (2501.02026) is sequential; Grammar Prompting (2305.19234) is BNF sequential; this uses PARALLEL rewriting with self-similarity.
